## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened.

### Environment
- **(AI) Source:** [e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome, Firefox, MSEdge]

### Plugin Settings
List any non-default settings you are using.
